problem id: 2fa48efe
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01010101 -> 01111110
  00101000 -> 10110100
  00101110 -> 10101111
  01000101 -> 00110110
  10101010 -> 11111101
  11100100 -> 11100010
  01011011 -> 01000001
  00000000 -> 00000000
  10011010 -> 00100101

query: 01010100
predicted answer: 01111010
